overall.description: Cinematic drone footage from a video game showing a stone angel statue on a palace terrace overlooking a lush valley with a snow-capped mountain. The camera smoothly orbits the statue before moving past it to reveal the expansive landscape below.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace with stone balustrade overlooking mountain valley

events.description: camera begins smooth counter-clockwise orbit around the stone angel statue
camera passes close to statue's wing, temporarily blocking view of the mountain

agents.ego_description: smoothly flying forward and beginning to circle the stone angel statue on the terrace

entered.detail: large stone statue of a winged angel with hands clasped, standing on a pedestal
stone railing with repeating arched openings overlooking the valley
tall pointed spire with reddish roofing tiles on the left side of the terrace
large mountain with snow-covered peak dominating the background
blue body of water visible in the valley below the terrace

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit palace terrace with a stone angel statue as the central focus. The camera begins a smooth counter-clockwise orbit around the statue, revealing the stone balustrade and a magnificent snow-capped mountain in the background. A red spire stands to the left while a blue lake glimmers in the distant valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: open overlook with ancient ruins and forested valley

events.description: camera moves past the statue, transitioning focus from the terrace architecture to the open valley landscape
camera continues forward over the terrace edge, fully revealing the forested valley below

agents.ego_description: circling past the statue and moving forward over the terrace to reveal the expansive valley landscape

entered.detail: ruined stone columns and arches visible on the hillside in the distance
dense green forest covering the valley floor below the terrace

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its orbit and moves past the angel statue, transitioning to an open overlook of the lush valley. Ancient ruins become visible on the right hillside while the dense forested valley fills the view below. The snow-capped mountain remains prominent in the background as the terrace architecture falls behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate focus on a palace sculpture and expands into a sweeping panoramic view of a vast mountain valley. It begins on a sunlit terrace, orbiting a stone angel statue in a smooth counter-clockwise motion that reveals a stone balustrade, a red spire, and a distant glimmering blue lake. As the camera completes its circle, it glides past the statue to leave the terrace architecture behind, shifting the perspective toward the open air. The scene then expands to reveal a lush, forested valley below and ancient ruins clinging to the right hillside, all while the prominent snow-capped mountain remains anchored in the background.
